title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 144.470 - Taxes now authorized not prohibited
text:
144.470.  Taxes now authorized not prohibited. — Nothing contained in sections 144.010 to 144.510 shall prevent the levying or collecting by any city, town, or village of any tax or license now authorized by any ordinance of such city, town or village.
(RSMo 1939 § 11455, A.L. 1941 p. 698, A.L. 1943 p. 1012, A.L. 1945 p. 1865)
